definitions.text: tilholdssted, område eller bygning der en virksomhet holder til
definitions.translation: place, area, or building where an activity is located

definitions.text: sted der en stanser under en reise
definitions.translation: place where one stops during a journey

definitions.text: holdeplass for tog, t-bane eller lignende der passasjerer kan gå på eller av
definitions.translation: stop for trains, subway where passengers can board or alight

definitions.text: midlertidig stoppested, for eksempel under marsj, løp eller lignende
definitions.translation: temporary stopping place, for example during a march, run

definitions.text: virksomhet som sender radio- eller tv-programmer
definitions.translation: organization that broadcasts radio or TV programs
